location: Dropped by the (unique/boss) Black Knife Assassin who guards the surface entrance to the Sainted Hero's Grave catacombs on the Altus Plateau — fought in the open, not inside the catacombs.

source.name: Black Knife Assassin (Sainted Hero's Grave, Altus Plateau)

tactics: Found directly west of the Rampartside Path Site of Grace — fast travel there and walk over rather than clearing the catacombs first.
She blinks/teleports into combo strings and her own dagger skill drains health through rolls, so block or create distance rather than trading hits.
A known cheese: stand behind the nearby lift — she swings twice at most then despawns, letting you land a free backstab and repeat.

Don't confuse her with the many ordinary Black Knife Assassins reused as regular enemies in other catacombs/caves (e.g. Sage's Cave) — only this specific boss-tier one guarding Sainted Hero's Grave drops the unique weapon.
lore: Carried by one of the assassins responsible for the Night of the Black Knives, the killing of the demigod Godwyn the Golden. The blade was ritually charged with a stolen fragment of the Rune of Death, letting it sap life even from a target that dodges the hit.

builds.name: Faith/Dex holy poke
builds.why: D/D scaling in Dexterity and Faith plus innate holy damage let a faith-leaning dex build add burst via the Blade of Death skill, whose percentage health drain ignores i-frames.

builds.name: Anti-evasion PvP tool
builds.why: Low weight and a skill that punishes rolling make it a strong pick against slippery, evasive opponents in duels.
